title: aerangis calligera
intro: Aerangis calligera, also known as the 'Orchid of the Mountains', is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Madagascar. This epiphytic plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aerangis calligera include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Aerangis calligera typically involve infusions of the plant's roots and leaves, which are used to create teas, tinctures, and other remedies.
